description: An IT auditor checks if sensitive data is being handled according to the company's data classification policy.

nodes.task_description: Use a data loss prevention (DLP) tool to scan company emails for any instances of 'Confidential' data being sent to external email addresses.

expected_outcome.value: The DLP tool flags several emails containing confidential financial data sent to personal Gmail accounts.

nodes.task_description: Review the access permissions on a network share drive designated for 'Highly Confidential' data.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds that the 'Everyone' group has read access to the folder, a policy violation.

nodes.task_description: Document the findings and recommend additional employee training on data handling policies.

expected_outcome.value: A finding is created with a recommendation for improved training.
